name: i18n-assistant
description: Extract selected text to translation dictionaries and replace it with t("key")

i18nAssistant.languages.description: Supported languages. One JSON dictionary file is expected per language code.

i18nAssistant.baseLanguage.description: Reference language used as source text for missing translations.

i18nAssistant.dictionaryRootPath.description: Dictionary root path relative to workspace root. dictionaryDir is resolved from this root.

i18nAssistant.dictionaryRootPaths.description: Optional list of dictionary roots for monorepo projects. The extension picks the nearest matching root for the current file.

i18nAssistant.dictionaryDir.description: Path to dictionaries directory relative to workspace root.

i18nAssistant.missingTranslationStrategy.description: How to fill missing non-base translations when input is empty.

i18nAssistant.postHookCommand.description: Command to execute in workspace root after extraction.

i18nAssistant.translationImportModule.description: Module name for translation hook import, for example react-i18next or next-intl.

i18nAssistant.translationImportName.description: Named import for translation hook/function, for example useTranslation or useTranslations.

i18nAssistant.translationHookSnippet.description: Code snippet inserted inside component when translation hook is missing.

i18nAssistant.translationFunctionName.description: Function name used in replacement expression, for example t.
